description_long: This object is a compact semi-automatic handgun with a matte black metal slide and a dark brown, ergonomically contoured grip. The grip features a textured surface for improved handling and a circular emblem near its base, likely indicating the manufacturer. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement and added safety. The slide has visible serrations at the rear for easier racking, and subtle markings are present, including what appears to be a model designation and other small engravings. The barrel is short and flush with the slide, with no visible threading or compensator. The magazine base is slightly rounded and blends seamlessly with the grip, lacking any pronounced extension or finger rest.
description: A compact black handgun with a textured brown grip, rounded trigger guard, and subtle slide markings. The design is ergonomic and streamlined, with a short barrel and flush magazine base.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed directly from the front, showing the muzzle opening and the rounded profile of the slide and barrel.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full profile of the handgun, including the textured brown grip, slide serrations, and visible slide markings.
description_view_2: The top-down view highlights the slimness of the slide, the alignment of the barrel, and the contours of the grip and magazine base.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the grip texture, slide, and trigger guard, but with fewer visible markings.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is dark brown with a gently curved ergonomic shape, featuring a textured surface for enhanced grip. It has a subtle checkered or stippled pattern and a circular emblem near the base, likely a manufacturer logo. The grip appears to be made of polymer or a similar synthetic material, with slight contouring for finger placement and a smooth transition to the magazine base.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing a robust protective loop around the trigger. It is smooth with no visible undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any integrated accessories or aggressive texturing. The design is simple and functional, prioritizing safety and comfort.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and flush with the front of the slide, with a standard round profile and no visible threading, porting, or compensator. The exterior finish matches the matte black of the slide, and there are no prominent markings or embellishments on the barrel itself.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features subtle engravings on the left side, including a model designation and possibly a serial number or manufacturer name. The markings are small and understated, located just above the trigger area and towards the rear serrations. No decorative patterns are visible.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is slightly rounded and flush with the bottom of the grip, lacking any extension, flare, or finger rest. It is smooth and blends seamlessly with the grip, with no visible logos or texturing on the exterior.
